_comment: M17 Unit 2: snapshot of the WAF rate-limit rule applied to the ai-skin-generator Worker route. Source of truth is the Cloudflare dashboard; this file exists for change-tracking, code review, and disaster recovery. Update both whenever the rule changes.

rule._rationale: 60 req/min/IP. The per-uid 30/day cap on the Vercel route is the real abuse defense. This WAF rule's job is to bound a token-leak abuse scenario, not to throttle legitimate Vercel egress traffic, which concentrates on a small pool of egress IPs. Lower thresholds (10/min) caused self-DoS in the M17 plan review.
